HGSS.578.0000:
Bill: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]! Would you do
something for me and take this EEVEE?\f
It came over when I was adjusting
Nintendo Wi-Fi Connection.\f
Someone has to take care of it,
but I don’t like being outside.\f
Can I count on you to play with it,
[0103,0000,0000]? [0200,0000]
HGSS.578.0001:
Bill: I knew you’d come through!
You’re the real deal! Way to go!\r
OK, I’m counting on you.\r
Take good care of it!\f
HGSS.578.0003:
Bill: Professor Elm said EEVEE can
evolve into seven different kinds\r
of Pokémon!
HGSS.578.0004:
Whoa, wait. You can’t carry any
more Pokémon.
HGSS.578.0006:
Bill: I used to do experiments on
transferring things.\f
Both the GTS and Nintendo Wi-Fi
Connection were inspired by\r
my machine that transfers things!
HGSS.578.0007:
Give a nickname to
the EEVEE you received? [0200,0000]
HGSS.578.0009:
Oh, you collect Pokémon?
My son Bill is an expert.\f
He just got called to the Pokémon
Center in Ecruteak City.
HGSS.578.0010:
Whatever happens, it makes me happy
to see my own son.
HGSS.578.0011:
My big brother Bill made the
Pokémon Storage System.
HGSS.578.0012:
Are you a Trainer?\f
I’ve got a useful phone number
for you. [0200,0000]
HGSS.578.0014:
My brother made the
Pokémon Storage System.\f
I was going to give you Bill’s number...
HGSS.578.0015:
When you call my brother, he can tell
you about the PC Boxes where you\r
store your Pokémon!
